productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Monetro White Sports Shoes
description: The Article id on the product box and physical product not matching because the article id on the product box is L39172 instead of L39672 but the sku's are same.The Adi Montero fitness shoe from adidas is a great choice if you're looking for a Sports shoe which will enhance your performance. Offering superior traction and protection from shock impact, while remaining comfortable, these shoes don't disappoint in the style stakes either - the red highlights lift this white and silver trainer into a cool fashion statement!UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for enhnaced brethability and extended durabilityThree rubber overlays across the sides of the upper for added structure to the shoe and signifying the brand's motto of performance, perseverance and achievementSynthetic central lacing for snug FitMesh cut-out on the heel cap with adidas logo to enable heat transferPadded collar and tongue for snug comfortSoft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole to provide all-day comfortMidsoleBuilt with AdiPrene technology to provide ample cushioning and protect the feet from the shock of impactEVA injected midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleCarbon rubber outsole with horizontal flex grooves for added tractionOutsole built with impact guidance system to ensure natural movement of the feetAdiwear outsole for better abrasion resistance and traction when playing sports on hard groundCarbon rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box to protect the forefootShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
